song.title: Come for Me
song.lyrics: [V1] .Capo 7th fret D .Intro: D Asus7 D Asus7 . D Asus7 D Asus7 G D/F# Asus Jesus come take me away, I long to see Your face . D/B D/F# G This world is broken yet beautifully made, . G Asus D Asus7 D Asus7 Jesus come take me away . D Asus7 D Asus7 G D/F# Asus Jesus I’ll patiently wait, till like a vapor I’ll fade . D/B D/F# G Help me fulfill all your dreams for these days, . G Asus D Asus7 D Asus7 Jesus I’ll patiently wait [C] . G D/F# Asus You’ll come again with a shout, . G D/F# Asus like a thief in the night you’ll come riding on clouds . D/B D/F# Asus D Finally the voice I have followed for life . G D/F# Asus has a glorious face that is lit up with light . G D/F# Asus G D/F# Asus And you’ll come for me, no more pain, peace, . G D/F# Asus No more fear, release . D/B D/F# Asus just lost and consumed with my glorious King, [V2] . D Asus7 D Asus7 G D/F# Asus Jesus today I am tired, I need your music to come and inspire . D/B D/F# G I give myself to be refined in this fire, . G Asus D Asus7 D Asus7 but Jesus today I’m so tired . tag D Asus7 D Asus7 Come for me
